objective: Diagnose and resolve Chroma collection path mismatch between Flask /health output and direct shell access.

List collections found at that exact persist directory
Confirm lariel_site_kb count from direct Chroma query at backend path

execution_instructions: Do not modify backend code in this task
commands_expected: cd ~/Documents/itheia-llm && python3 -c "import chromadb; c=chromadb.PersistentClient(path='chromadb_data'); print([col.name for col in c.list_collections()])"
